title: Applying for a Drug Identification Number (DIN) to distribute or sell hand sanitizer: Contact us - Canada.ca
content:
## Applying for a Drug Identification Number (DIN) to distribute or sell hand sanitizer: Contact us
- Submitting your application

## Natural and Non-prescription Health Products Directorate
For questions about submitting a hand sanitizer application (with or without the use of a Health Canada monograph), please email us at hc.nnhpd-dpsnso.sc@canada.ca .

## eReview within Office of Submissions and Intellectual Property
